headline: Help has a home.
acronym: Helping Agencies, Volunteers, and Everyone Navigate
inspiration: Gridless: Survival App (Dark theme, dashboard layout, clear hierarchy, tactical)

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (Generous padding on landing page, compact on dashboard)
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Gridcols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Dense 'Control Room' grid.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-lg (subtle roundness, max 8px for a professional, tactical look)
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px borders instead of heavy shadows to separate sections.

ui_elements.cards: Flat background (surface color), 1px solid border (#27272A), no default shadow. Hover: border darkens, slight shadow-lg.
ui_elements.buttons: Primary: Solid primary color, white text. Secondary: Outline with primary color. High contrast.
ui_elements.glassmorphism: Used sparingly for sticky headers or floating tools (e.g., BB AI bubble). backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border.
ui_elements.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized to dark theme. bg-surface border-border text-text_primary focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary.

components_instructions.caseworker_dashboard: The showpiece. Top: Quick metrics. Middle: Active Case list (data table) and Live Resource Map Widget (compact, pinch/zoom). Side/Bottom: BB AI assistant panel.
components_instructions.resource_map_widget: Drag/pinch/double-tap-zoom enabled. Snap-to-location button. Distinct icons for user vs resources. Dark abstract map styling.
components_instructions.bb_ai_assistant: Always present. Floating bubble that expands into a sidebar panel. Features: Chat, Browser Autofill (live screen actions visual), crisis detection.
components_instructions.landing_page: Headline: 'Help has a home.' Primary CTA: Book a Session (Calendly). Visuals: Hero map bg + tactical grids.
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky nav. Logo left. Links center. Login/CTA right. backdrop-blur-xl.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D topography map, dark theme, deep slate, glowing paths.

technical_grid_bg.description: Modern, clean dark UI abstract background, subtle gradient mesh.
technical_grid_bg.usage: Dashboard base background or section dividers.

team_meeting.usage: About page or feature highlight on landing page.

relief_hands.description: Hands reaching out, symbolizing connection and relief.

map_abstract.description: Illuminated map with location pins and blue LED.
map_abstract.usage: Fallback or visual for the Resource Map widget placeholder if needed.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Dark mode text must be light enough.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

developer_instructions: Build robust, tactical, investor-ready UI. Prioritize Caseworker dashboard layout and BB AI Assistant integration. Follow dark theme stringently. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing, Shadcn for dashboard. Don't use Inter for headings.
